# Alcoa Aluminium Scaffolding

> Scaffolding rental service in Abu Dhabi, UAE since 2008. 4.6★ Google rating. Legal name: Alcoa Aluminium Scaffolding L.L.C - S.P.C. Musaffah 37 warehouse — serves Abu Dhabi, Yas Island, KIZAD, and surrounding zones. Cuplock, mobile towers, ladders from AED 35/day. Certified erection crews.

## Contact
- Phone: +971 58 137 5601 / +971 50 926 8038
- Email: sales@alcoascaffolding.com, info@alcoascaffolding.com
- Address: Ar Rahmah 4 St., Musaffah 37, Al Mantaqah As Sinai'yah, Office 11, Abu Dhabi, UAE
- Hours: Mon–Thu, Sat: 8am–6pm | Fri: 8am–12pm | Emergency dispatch available

## Location pages
- [Scaffolding Rental Abu Dhabi](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-rental-abu-dhabi): Industrial & residential, ADNOC-zone, Yas, Saadiyat, Reem Island
- [Scaffolding Rental Musaffah](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-rental-musaffah): Walk-in M-40 warehouse pickup, same-day local delivery
- [Scaffolding Rental KIZAD](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-rental-kizad): Khalifa Industrial Zone same-day delivery, industrial cuplock
- [Scaffolding Hire Yas Island](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-hire-yas-island): Construction, facade, MEP access on Yas Island Abu Dhabi
- [Scaffolding Near Me UAE](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-near-me-uae): Abu Dhabi hire quotes via WhatsApp

## Products
- [Aluminium Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/aluminium-scaffolding): Mobile towers single/double width, stairway, folding
- [Ladders](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/ladders): Aluminium & fiberglass A-type, extension, platform ladders
- [Steel Cuplock Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/steel-cuplock-scaffolding): Standards, ledgers, transoms, jacks, GI/MS pipe, planks
- [Couplers & Clamps](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/couplers): Double, swivel, putlog, beam couplers, spigot pins, joint pins

## Pricing (indicative AED)
- Aluminium towers: AED 35–60 / day; AED 200–350 / week; AED 600–1100 / month
- Steel cuplock bay: AED 40–75 / day; AED 250–450 / week
- Ladders: AED 25–45 / day
- Couplers: AED 3–15 / piece / day
- Weekly & monthly discounts: 15–30% off daily rate
- Delivery Abu Dhabi & Musaffah: AED 150–350 per trip; Musaffah pickup free
